message:
feat(engine): implement closure variable capture via scope chain

Closures can now capture variables from enclosing scopes. The fix adds
free variable detection at IR1 lowering time and scope chain mirroring
at IR3 lowering time:

1. ir_contract.rs: Added `free_vars: Vec<String>` field to both
   DeclareFunction and CreateFunction IR1 ops to track which outer
   variables the function body references.

2. lowering_pipeline.rs (IR0→IR1): During function body lowering,
   compare body-created forward-reference bindings against the outer
   scope's binding_lookup to identify free variables. Pass them through
   the free_vars field.

3. lowering_pipeline.rs (IR2→IR3, main loop): Before CreateClosure,
   emit PushScope + DeclareBinding + StoreScoped to put outer scope
   bindings on the scope chain when free_vars is non-empty.

4. lowering_pipeline.rs (IR2→IR3, deferred loop): Pre-scan function
   bodies for child closures with free vars. When found, mirror local
   variable StoreBinding ops to StoreScoped so the scope chain snapshot
   captured by CreateClosure contains the outer variables. Inner function
   bodies emit LoadScoped for free variable access.

Test: `function outer() { let x = 10; return function() { return x; }; }
let f = outer(); f();` now correctly returns 10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
